## Market Analysis: Top Chains by TVL
TL;DR: Comprehensive chain rankings by total value locked.
- Ethereum: $98.06B TVL — https://www.defi.garden/?chain=Ethereum
- Solana: $9.24B TVL — https://www.defi.garden/?chain=Solana
- BSC: $7.31B TVL — https://www.defi.garden/?chain=BSC
- Base: $6.39B TVL — https://www.defi.garden/?chain=Base
- Tron: $3.78B TVL — https://www.defi.garden/?chain=Tron
- Arbitrum: $2.67B TVL — https://www.defi.garden/?chain=Arbitrum
- Hyperliquid L1: $1.68B TVL — https://www.defi.garden/?chain=Hyperliquid%20L1
- Avalanche: $1.33B TVL — https://www.defi.garden/?chain=Avalanche
